name: Monero Node
description: Monero full node (sethforprivacy/simple-monerod) with restricted RPC.
compose:
name: "slashnode-monerod"
services:
  monerod:
    image: "sethsimmons/simple-monerod:latest"
    container_name: "monerod"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command: "--rpc-bind-ip=0.0.0.0 --rpc-bind-port=18081 --confirm-external-bind --rpc-restricted-bind-ip=0.0.0.0 --rpc-restricted-bind-port=18089 --no-igd --enable-dns-blocklist --p2p-bind-port=18080"
    ports:
      - "18080:18080"
      - "18089:18089"
      - "127.0.0.1:18081:18081"
    volumes:
      - "monerod-data:/home/monero/.bitmonero"
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  monerod-data:
    name: "slashnode-monerod_monerod_monerod-data"
notes: Restricted public RPC on 18089, full RPC on localhost:18081. Initial sync takes a while.
